title: Hook Manifest
description: Schema for hve-core collection-scoped hook manifests under .github/hooks/<collection>/<name>.json. Event keys use the Copilot CLI lowercase form; VS Code converts them to PascalCase at load time. Declaring an event in both CLI-lowercase and PascalCase form is rejected so each event fires once.

version.description: Manifest schema version. Only version 1 is currently defined.

description.description: Short description of what the hook does.

hooks.description: Map of lifecycle event names to arrays of hook command entries.

type.description: Hook entry type. Only "command" is supported.

bash.description: Copilot CLI property mapped to the osx and linux commands.

powershell.description: Copilot CLI property mapped to the windows command.

windows.description: Windows-specific command override. VS Code-native property.

linux.description: Linux-specific command override. VS Code-native property.

osx.description: macOS-specific command override. VS Code-native property.

cwd.description: Working directory relative to the repository root.

env.description: Additional environment variables for the command.

timeout.description: Timeout in seconds. VS Code-native property (default 30).

timeoutSec.description: Timeout in seconds. Copilot CLI property.
